creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
> 1. No access to update the net-mgmt\zabbix port. I am not MAINTAINER net-mgmt\zabbix port. (example my update from version 166 to 167: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=140922)
> 2. Very slow support port net-mgmt\zabbix. (example zabbix 1.6.7 release date 12 November 2009, currently in the port net-mgmt\zabbix contains version 1.6.6)

Those are not good reasons. Please prepare an update to existing zabbix
port instead.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

You have acquired a scroll entitled 'irk gleknow mizk' (n).
This is an IBM Manual scroll.
You are permanently confused.
